metadata.purpose: Narrow the current wallet-review workload to launch-window-relevant wallets without treating the full historical registry as the active review queue.
policy: Do not treat this file as a replacement for data/network-map.json.
Use this file to choose review batches and live-call budgets.
Promote findings back to data/network-map.json only through an explicit reviewed registry patch.
Run npm run audit:primitive-integrity -- data/current-wallet-review-scope.json after edits.
Run npm run audit:claim-integrity -- data/current-wallet-review-scope.json after edits when the edit changes wallet conclusions or monitor-candidate classifications.

include: wallets with prior-session pre-deploy signal or copy-trade classification
recent coordinated on-chain campaign wallets since the L10 launch
current-balance hubs or consolidation wallets that could fund fresh wallets
highest-value sniper or trading wallets that matter only if re-armed
exclude: monitor-owned onramp watches unless the monitor coverage itself is under review
historical one-off relays with no current launch-window action

monitor_owned_out_of_scope.label: MoonPay customer-facing SOL wallet 1
monitor_owned_out_of_scope.reason: handled by live monitor; revisit during monitor coverage review

monitor_owned_out_of_scope.label: MoonPay customer-facing SOL wallet 2
monitor_owned_out_of_scope.reason: handled by live monitor; revisit during monitor coverage review

recent_activity_batches.scope_policy: Review as a recent-activity batch. Do not promote every buyer to core control evidence without transaction-level proof and post-review classification.
recent_activity_batches.recommended_command: npm run audit:wallet-review -- --wallet-file data/rxrp-repump-buyers.json --checks helius-balance,helius-signatures --signature-limit 5 --question <bounded RXRP recent-activity review question> --execute --out data/results/wallet-review-rxrp-repump-2026-04-24.json
recent_activity_batches.dry_run_command: npm run audit:wallet-review -- --wallet-file data/rxrp-repump-buyers.json --checks helius-balance,helius-signatures --signature-limit 5 --question <bounded RXRP recent-activity review question>

monitor_candidate_batches.review_question: Triage remaining untriaged monitor candidates pre-L11 (Nukex, 2026-04-25 14:00-18:00 EST): 73 MoonPay MP2 candidates, 3 RXRP-chain singletons (FTX US / ChangeNOW / Robinhood buyer chains), 2 deferred CoinSpot wallets (id 43, 64), and an MP1 spot-check parse to validate the bulk-classified memecoin assumption.
monitor_candidate_batches.scope_policy: Use as a monitor-candidate shortlist only. Do not promote to data/network-map.json without a separate reviewed registry patch.

source_refs.note: Local backup at ~/Desktop/db-backup/l11-manual-20260424-1435.db (VPS SSH key auth failed in this session — operator must re-pull live DB before cross-checking against fresh state). Filtered status='detected' AND funding_source_label IN ('MoonPay Hot Wallet 2','RXRP Buyer 7cthuERB (ChangeNOW)','RXRP Buyer AZ57WTNM (Robinhood)','RXRP Buyer 54Pz1e35 (FTX US chain, user-labelled insider)','CoinSpot Exchange Hot Wallet') restricted to ids 43,64.

trigger_policy: any outbound SOL transfer from keep-list wallets
balance change above 0.5 SOL on keep-list wallets
create_and_buy instruction execution by any keep-list wallet
monitor_candidate_batches.methodology: Pass A: Helius getBalance on 79 wallets (73 MP2 + 3 RXRP + 2 deferred CoinSpot + 1 priority-1-keep recheck) = 79 cr. Pass B: getTransactionHistory mode=signatures limit 8-25 on 17 standouts (intact, partial, drained singletons, MP1 spot-check) = ~170 cr. Pass D: parseTransactions batched (4 sigs for HefCL8a29 + FgsvEDugq drains, 8 sigs for RXRP drains + MP1 spot-check) = 200 cr. Cross-check counterparties against data/network-map.json. Total ~450 cr.

keep_list.reason: MoonPay MP2 funded 12.548 SOL; 1 signature lifetime (the funding tx); zero post-funding activity; balance matches funded amount exactly; MoonPay memo present (b947697e47a240b42ce6846ee6896bb4). Funded ~5h before review = INSIDE the 12-26h pre-deploy window for L11 (Nukex, 2026-04-25 14:00-18:00 EST). Highest priority candidate of this batch.

MoonPay MP2 funded 9.941 SOL; 1 signature lifetime (the funding tx); zero post-funding activity; balance matches funded amount exactly; MoonPay memo present (25a0fee2ff6f88f695ffb5eec377dc4a). 38h dormancy at review exceeds 26h max-observed L4-L10 deployer fresh-wallet hold but matches all other shape criteria. Per cross-session feedback rule (don't discount candidates for age alone), keep on watch through 2026-04-25T11:00Z funding-window close.

INFLATED above funded amount: 37.51 SOL current balance vs. 13.0 SOL monitor-detected funding. Pass D parse reveals 2 lifetime txs, BOTH inbound from CSEncqtq (CoinSpot Exchange Hot Wallet, network-map): 24.51142942 SOL on 2026-04-09 20:45 UTC + 13.0 SOL on 2026-04-21 01:29 UTC (this latter is the monitor-detected event). Zero outflows, dormant. 2-deposit CoinSpot accumulator pattern is consistent with the existing 9a22FhBe collection-wallet warming behavior in network-map (multiple CSEncqtq pre-arms before launch event). 91h dormancy post-most-recent-funding exceeds 26h historical max but per cross-session feedback rule, keep on watch. Operationally usable: 37.5 SOL is well above any historical deploy buy and could fund multiple bundles.

mp1_spot_check_findings.purpose: Validate the bulk-classified memecoin assumption on the 41 still-detected MP1 drained wallets from prior session (data/current-wallet-review-scope.json batch moonpay_mp1_candidate_review_2026_04_24).

wallets_parsed.evidence: 8+ lifetime sigs spanning April 17 funding through April 22 activity; cNFT mint context confirms wallet is a token-holding active address, not a fresh deployer.
PUMP_AMM SWAP 2L5KhVvfJftfTKWvctjTLi77nNi9utPGro1QPzUkqb9nxa1gHrU5F29BqUshPxvfHy8B2R6qAgP3Lh4opF5E3EaQ at 2026-04-19T13:46:56Z (28min post-funding) sold 26.95M ASTERDOGE for 0.531 SOL.
Jupiter SWAP dsoeimJCgp7AhFHqHRbRtgSk8qhsThfsgayydahgSpofVnii8qBeU9pMbss17noZJkqJQ7ZKvgx82K3QzZJTjKg at 2026-04-21T18:18:50Z trading PVE token; 8+ lifetime sigs.

TRANSFER YuUBazVcN7dYAj7uUNjNW1GSRgdxgSCcKepBA9PYC1FH3PKePnPJeuc5C5Ej2hdUeVggH9g1BHnihFuSyjsGcDq at 2026-04-22T09:03:14Z (7 min post-funding) forwarded 19.9 SOL to BUen8C3J8AsJQiWXfGfvDGCPzceaNRMEH4ctcKKu9Hm3 (single hop, not in network-map — flag for follow-up; could be CEX deposit or onward relay).

mp1_spot_check_findings.conclusion: Memecoin/relay assumption holds. 4/5 parsed wallets confirmed memecoin swap (ids 8, 31) or pure SOL relay (id 77) or active trading (id 124). 1/5 (id 1) ambiguous parse but high lifetime sig count rules out fresh-deployer shape. The MP1 batch's 41 still-pending bulk-classified rule_outs from prior session can be confidently rejected.

analytical_findings.summary: L10 deployer 2mZzsVKNz1zJKRnLz2X74qGPMcSNGCkRM1U5BShsVMVB exhibits the same operator-signal dust-ping tradecraft registry-documented for signal_wallets_2zi_cluster on DmA9JabHEHFDzUQge7UFQ41jR7a8MThNn3GW87CvGWBn (data/network-map.json line 349). HYM3vkUkXB8aR73d3JbLbuxmfAzM9isgGRxB8owciFdG and HYM1nkDaSdmNT5xgQ3fhrmHHM2VnanH4QSLFKsxGTVdG dust-ping 2mZz 15-21s after each cashout tx to HYMtCcfQTkBGw7uufDZtYHzg48pUmmBWPf5S44akPfdG (L7 deployer, data/network-map.json line 29), which itself shares the HYM prefix with the pingers.
analytical_findings.evidence: getWalletTransfers on 2mZzsVKNz1zJKRnLz2X74qGPMcSNGCkRM1U5BShsVMVB returned 134 transfers; 2026-03-24 cashout batch had 4 bracketed pairs (USDC 5 / 500 / 10,195.9 sent then SOL 5.4 sent, each followed 15-16s later by 0.00001 SOL dust from HYM3vkUkXB8aR73d3JbLbuxmfAzM9isgGRxB8owciFdG); 2026-04-11 cashout had 10.2 SOL sent at 10:29:52Z followed by dust from HYM3vkUkXB8aR73d3JbLbuxmfAzM9isgGRxB8owciFdG at 10:30:08Z (16s) and HYM1nkDaSdmNT5xgQ3fhrmHHM2VnanH4QSLFKsxGTVdG at 10:30:13Z (21s). Additionally odinrnLqM2dT4MJjC8vqTByeXyjFU2GQkwWEeSFpKgK sent 0 SOL to 2mZzsVKNz1zJKRnLz2X74qGPMcSNGCkRM1U5BShsVMVB on 2026-03-28T20:46:00Z — different vanity family, single post-deploy ping.
analytical_findings.caveat: Separately, JATcFT2j762i7CAayBhQCGuKVstxgL3gWwQXKWtSPbj4 sent 2mZz ~20 zero-SOL pings in a 30-minute burst on 2026-03-23; no vanity-prefix tie to any known operator wallet, no event correlation — probable spam/airdrop noise, not operator signal.

monitor_candidate_batches.scope_policy: Use as a monitor-candidate shortlist only. Do not promote to data/network-map.json without a separate reviewed registry patch.
monitor_candidate_batches.review_question: Which of the 48 MoonPay MP1-funded candidates in the monitor DB are intact + dormant L11 deployer-shape vs. drained / memecoin-traded / cashed-out?
monitor_candidate_batches.methodology: Pass A: Helius getBalance on all 48 (48 cr); bucket intact/partial/drained. Pass B: getSignaturesForAddress (limit 15) on 13-wallet age-focused subset (130 cr). Pass C: getWalletTransfers on 7 priority wallets (700 cr). Pass D: parseTransactions batch (100 cr) on drain signatures; getWalletTransfers on 3 new odin siblings (300 cr); getBalance on 5 new addresses (5 cr); getWalletIdentity on Bitstamp pre-activator (100 cr). Cross-check counterparties against data/network-map.json + scope analytical_findings (257 addresses).
trigger_policy: any outbound SOL transfer from keep-list wallets
balance change above 0.5 SOL on keep-list wallets
create_and_buy instruction execution by any keep-list wallet

analytical_findings.summary: Odin-prefix vanity pinger family pings memecoin traders, not just deployer-controlled fresh wallets. Materially weakens prior CoinSpot-batch interpretation that odin pings are operator/deployer signal.
analytical_findings.evidence: Two MP1 candidates parsed as memecoin traders received 0 SOL pings from new odin siblings: EvJYbZq1ZNZ9YEmcHNDcRJqhqQ72QgyUJMRVcn6HojtZ pinged by odin2Nz2vGnusxtqJ4XGmbDjK8bGaDztA61eaVBbqE1 32s after funding; FnPMq2Zit7PaC2QRo8WvHZK6WGusVwEcydyf3LYgk3Pb pinged by odinhdmLXrHtu9fz9sQfSC2mHbDQ9PbSQ4W3qiL6H9m and odinNbczS1tKZsFFkg3ZwvDLbdZCCNuY89ddfDEq5Hi. All 3 new odin siblings transact internally with the previously known sibling odinZCYLkjzeAxhZ8uF6Eea1GF6iPczsPbKSEnh7A7s, confirming the family is internally coherent but its targets are not deployer-only.
analytical_findings.implication: Do NOT use odin-family ping as an elevation criterion for L11 candidate scoring. The HYM-prefix tradecraft on L10 deployer 2mZzsVKNz1zJKRnLz2X74qGPMcSNGCkRM1U5BShsVMVB remains a separate, confirmed deployer signal; odin family appears to be a generic fresh-wallet monitoring service.
analytical_findings.caveat: odin getWalletTransfers responses each exceeded 88-220k chars due to high ping volume; only address-set was extracted, not full transfer schedule.

analytical_findings.summary: Of 48 MP1 candidates, 0 inflated, 3 intact, 8 partial-drained, 37 drained. Of the 4 drained candidates parsed individually, all 4 were SOL-to-token swaps via DFlow or Jupiter (Awkwardism, TRUMP, DOGE/Gas City) or fast CEX cashout. MP1 hot wallet Cc3bpPzUvgAzdW9Nv7dUQ8cpap8Xa7ujJgLdpqGrTCu6 appears to feed retail memecoin buyers more than would be expected if a deployer were using it.
analytical_findings.implication: Lower base-rate of deployer presence in MP1 vs CoinSpot. Continue MP2 triage but expect the same drain-to-DEX dominance.

analytical_findings.summary: 6uYzo6ZRYehusYyaaM8XbZE11da98hyaryBtDKVyB8Bb (MP1 monitor id 148) was pre-activated by 0.13519 SOL from 9D8xSHWqF9NJWqCtn3rNxYEox63aCbWxYzTMfMur7Cc9 (Helius getWalletIdentity = Bitstamp Hot Wallet, exchange/CEX, 44,987 SOL balance) 11 minutes before MoonPay funding. Pattern indicates a multi-onramp user, not deployer signal in itself, but the Bitstamp hot wallet is now identified.
analytical_findings.implication: Add Bitstamp hot wallet as a labeled CEX hot wallet in any future registry patch. Watch for similar pre-activation -> MoonPay sequences across MP2 / RXRP-singleton triage; if recurrent on a single fresh wallet that subsequently goes dormant in the 12-26h band, escalate.
analytical_findings.proposed_patch_outline: Add 9D8xSHWqF9NJWqCtn3rNxYEox63aCbWxYzTMfMur7Cc9 to data/network-map.json with role=cex_hot_wallet, label=Bitstamp Hot Wallet, source=helius_getWalletIdentity, source_date=2026-04-25.

analytical_findings.summary: All 13 MP1 funding signatures inspected in Pass B carry the 32-char hex memo expected by the MoonPay-routed Solana fingerprint documented in STRATEGY.md Vector A. No false positives observed in the bounded sample.
analytical_findings.implication: MP1 fingerprint matches the rotation pool, MP2 should match. Use the fingerprint check as a confirmation gate when triaging single-wallet leads outside the monitor sieve.
analytical_findings.caveat: Bounded sample of 13 of 48; not a proof across the full batch.

relay_destinations_follow_up.note: Drain destination for monitor id 128; 11.68 SOL inbound 7 minutes post-funding with 4-char ASCII memo amit. Likely CEX deposit; identity not yet verified via getWalletIdentity. Suggest 1 getWalletIdentity (100 cr) to confirm.

vanity_pingers_follow_up.note: Pinged 149 EvJYbZq1ZNZ9YEmcHNDcRJqhqQ72QgyUJMRVcn6HojtZ (memecoin trader) 32s after MoonPay funding. 0 SOL balance. Sibling of odinZCYLkjzeAxhZ8uF6Eea1GF6iPczsPbKSEnh7A7s. Per analytical_findings.odin_pinger_family_broader_than_deployer_signal, ping is non-specific.
